mapper.select: SELECT m.mem_idx, m.mem_id, m.mem_name, m.mem_email, p.mem_nickname, p.mem_img, g.grade_name FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_profile p ON m.mem_idx = p.mem_idx JOIN grade g ON m.mem_grade_idx = g.grade_idx WHERE m.mem_idx = #{memIdx}
SELECT a.*, s.auction_status_name FROM auction a INNER JOIN auction_status s ON a.auction_status_idx = s.auction_status_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY a.auction_regdate DESC

SELECT b.board_idx AS boardIdx, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_regdate AS boardRegdate, b.board_view_count AS boardViewCount, b.mem_idx AS memIdx, t.board_type_name AS boardTypeName, t.board_type_code AS boardTypeCode FROM board b JOIN board_type t ON b.board_type_idx = t.board_type_idx WHERE b.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.board_regdate DESC

SELECT b.board_idx AS boardIdx, b.mem_idx AS memIdx, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_regdate AS boardRegdate, b.board_view_count AS boardViewCount, m.mem_name AS memName, t.board_type_code AS boardTypeCode FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx JOIN board_type t ON b.board_type_idx = t.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, b.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bid_price AS bidPrice, b.bid_regdate AS bidRegdate, s.bid_status_name AS bidStatusName, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid_status s ON b.bid_status_idx = s.bid_status_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE b.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY b.bid_regdate DESC
